failures.summary: Biomass reads 0.85 g/L, 7 sigma above nominal 0.5
Biomass at second sample reads 0.7 g/L, 4 sigma above nominal

analysis.summary: Only Biomass observations are present; spec coverage is sparse and other variables have no data to characterize

open_questions.question: Were measurements for pH, Temperature, and DO collected for this run?
open_questions.why_it_matters: without those variables, biomass anomalies cannot be cross-checked

open_questions.question: How frequently was Biomass sampled in this run?
open_questions.why_it_matters: two readings is too few to distinguish a real trend from sampling noise

narrative: Sparse fixture with two Biomass anomalies. Other variables not measured, so the diagnosis is heavy on open questions about sampling completeness.
